auto_repaired: canonical_present check now accepts hydrated #gp-canonical placeholder

oauth.reason: Pinterest requires interactive user consent for new scopes. No API path can grant them.

merchant_center.reason: Requires catalogs:read scope (blocked by OAuth) plus interactive domain claim in Pinterest Business UI

pinterest_tag.reason: Verified via analytics not Pinterest API; covered by existing PinterestTracking hook

capi.reason: Test purchase requires Stripe live session + ads:read to confirm event delivery in Pinterest UI

human_actions_required: Re-authorize Pinterest at /admin/pinterest (Reconnect with Full Access) and grant ALL requested scopes including catalogs and ads
After OAuth: claim getpawsy.pet domain in Pinterest Business Hub and submit product feed for Merchant approval
After Merchant approval: run a $1 Stripe test purchase to verify CAPI Purchase event delivery
